rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHARLIE EVERRETT STEVENSON & ALDONIE STEVENSON REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Real Property Is An Asset Of The Charlie Stevenson And Aldonia Stevenson Revocable Trust Dated August 19 2010 For Authority To Sell Trust Real Property Located At 347 Orizaba Avenue San Francisco Ca And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement With Pat Rock Coldwell Banker
rulings.Rulings: hearing. the examiner has no issue with the request to confirm the san francisco property is an asset of the trust. the issue for hearing is the request to confirm property in Texas is trust property. The Notice of Hearing did not include a description of the Texas property, so it's not clear this hearing can proceed if Petitioner seeks an order for both properties (this Court does not issue piecemeal orders). In addition, Counsel may be asked to address what jurisdiction this court has to make orders over real property in Texas.
